question: Is MIT Vishwashanti Gurukul the same school as Vishwashanti Gurukul World School?
answer: Yes. 'MIT Vishwashanti Gurukul' is the former name. The current official name is Vishwashanti Gurukul World School (VGWS). The 'World School' suffix was added to signal full IB Continuum status and distinguish the school from other MAEER entities and CBSE-curriculum schools.
source: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

question: Is VGWS an IB Continuum school?
answer: Yes. Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a formally authorized IB Continuum School offering all four IB programmes: PYP (authorized April 2009), MYP (April 2018), DP (May 2006), and CP (October 2025).
source: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School: Comprehensive Master Source of Truth (2022-2026)

question: Is VGWS government-recognized?
